lists.3: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or operation obstructed or blocked

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

VmaxActLock.comment: 4GRIP Speed limit to keep the LOCK_DRIVE_MODE activated.

Vmaxlock.comment: Threshold  to go in Auto mode from Lock without cutomer request

Vreenauto.comment: 4GRIP speed threshold to reactivate automatically the AUTO_Operative_Mode

VmaxAnticipation.comment: Max speed to applied the Anticipation strategy

VminAnticipation.comment: Min speed to applied the Anticipation strategy

Undercurrent_Threshold.comment: Current threshold to detect leakage on motodifferential

Undercurrent_Time_Detection.comment: Undercurrent time see by the ECU to detect an external leakage

Waiting_Time_After_Undercurrent_Detectio.comment: Waiting time applied by the ECU before to supply the pump after an undercurrent detection

Undercurrent_Detection_Number.comment: Number of overcurrent detection cycle before cut the definitively during the journey

u_AccelOffThrs.comment: The accelerator pedal position value must be higher than or equal to  this value to be in required d

Umin_AfterIGN_default.comment: Voltage threshold (min) to authorize 4-GRIP function after IGN default

Umax_AfterIGN_default.comment: Voltage threshold (max) to authorize 4-GRIP function after IGN default

Tsensor_confirmation_timeout.comment: Period during which the ECU has to detect a default on the T° sensor before stopping the 4-GRIP func

SwitchRequestDelay.comment: Timeout to confirm that switch position has changed

Supply_voltage_def_timeout.comment: Period of bus off before the ECU stops the 4-GRIP function

uyr_MaxRelAcc.comment: Maximal lateral acceleration for limitation of estimated YawRate value

lists.1: 1- Yaw rate CAN parameter from the Braking system.

WheelBase.comment: Wheelbase  : distance between front and rear axles

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

P_fix_ECUKeepAliveTImeout.comment: Timeout to ensure E² handling and ROM check before ECU 4GRIP shutdown.

SLIP_DETECTION_LEVEL_1.comment: Slipping threshold to activate the GEP in AUTO_Operative_Mode from Auto_Driver_mode

SLIP_DETECTION_LEVEL_1_EXIT.comment: Slipping threshold to deactivate the GEP in AUTO_Operative_Mode from Auto_Driver_mode

LOCK_Max_Duration_without_Slip.comment: Timer value to disengage the GEP if no slip is detected in Lock mode

Overcurrent_Detection_Number.comment: Number of overcurrent detection cycle before cut the definitively during the journey

P_tng_pct_MaxDeltaSlipForPSD.comment: The delta wheel slip (during the detection time) must be lower than this value to be in required PSD
